permissions.fallback_msg: The xlsx skill needs to read spreadsheet files (e.g., .xlsx, .csv, .tsv) and related scripts from your workspace. Allow this read operation?
The xlsx skill needs to write or overwrite spreadsheet files in your workspace. Allow this write operation?
The xlsx skill needs to run the recalc.py script (via LibreOffice) to recalculate Excel formulas and check for errors. Allow this shell execution?
The xlsx skill needs to start a Python session to run pandas and openpyxl operations. Allow creating a REPL session?
The xlsx skill needs to execute Python code (pandas, openpyxl) inside a REPL session for spreadsheet creation, editing, or analysis. Allow this execution?
The xlsx skill needs to read output (including recalc.py JSON results and formula error details) from the REPL session. Allow reading REPL output?
The xlsx skill may need to install Python packages (pandas, openpyxl) or configure LibreOffice on first run. Allow package installation?
